items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Validation of AI-generated parameters', but the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces that confirm the expected outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not demonstrate the necessary functionality or outcomes related to the AI-generated parameters, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and results, the validation cannot be completed.
